providers.name: Amanda Gallagher-Dunning, MS, APRN-BC, RNC
providers.bio: Amanda leads the clinical team at Glo de Vie with advanced training in aesthetic medicine. As a board-certified nurse practitioner and registered nurse clinician, she brings expertise, precision, and a personalized approach to every treatment.

providers.name: Dr. Benjamin Eskra, M.D.
providers.bio: Dr. Eskra serves as Medical Director of Glo de Vie, providing clinical oversight and ensuring the highest standards of safety and care across all treatments and providers.

providers.name: Jen P.
providers.bio: Jen is a nurse practitioner specializing in medical aesthetics, bringing clinical precision and a gentle approach to injectable and skin treatments.

providers.name: Jacki R., BSN, RN
providers.bio: Jacki is a registered nurse on the medical aesthetics team, focused on delivering safe, effective treatments with exceptional patient care.
